Off Calendar Oct-25-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Telephonic conference held on Friday, October 25, 2013 at 1:30 p.m. (as continued from October 24, 2013) by the parties and Court re: Plaintiff CACH, LLC'S Motion For Order That Matters In Request For Admissions Be Deemed Admitted; Request For Monetary Sanctions. RULING: Motion granted in part and denied in part. Plaintiff's counsel to submit a form of order. Judge Pro Tem: Robert Kane; Clerk L. Fong; matter not reported. (302/JPT)

Notice Of Motion For Order That Matters In Request For Admissions Be Deemed Admitted; Request For Monetary Sanctions

Peter H. Liederman, Esq. [510.681.6916] specially appearing for Plaintiff CACH, LLC;
TARYN A. SOON, Defendant appearing In Propria Persona
